params.SpellDescription: You may cast an artifact spell from your hand with mana value less than or equal to the number of ingenuity counters on NICKNAME without paying its mana cost.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: You may cast an artifact spell from your hand with mana value less than or equal to the number of ingenuity counters on NICKNAME without paying its mana cost.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you draw your first or second card each turn, put an ingenuity counter on NICKNAME.
Whenever you draw your first or second card each turn, put an ingenuity counter on NICKNAME.
